title: Session 95: Series Comparison
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview In this session we use Riemann sums to compare series to indefinite integrals. This allows us to determine whether the series converge and may help determine the value of a convergent series.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Comparison of the Harmonic Series
Clip 2: Comparison Tests
Clip 3: Examples of Comparison
